title: ranunculus manifestus
intro: Ranunculus manifestus is a species of flowering plant in the genus Ranunculus, commonly known as the lesser celandine. The medicinal properties of Ranunculus manifestus include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an anti-spasmodic agent, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and muscle spasms. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation due to its sedative properties, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Ranunculus manifestus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
